plan.title: Dashboard data layer: consolidate polling, push-first architecture
plan.author: plan

narratives.Problem: Dashboard takes 5-20+ seconds to open workspace detail panels due to 80+ HTTP requests/minute from aggressive, duplicated polling. Three independent /api/issues fetches (1.3MB each) with different React Query keys saturate the browser's 6-connection HTTP/1.1 limit. The 15,793-line monolithic Express server compounds the problem with three uncoordinated transport paradigms.
narratives.Proposal: Full Effect.js migration: replace Express + socket.io with Effect HTTP server + WebSocket RPC. Bun as package manager + dev runtime, shared contracts package, SQLite event store with PubSub, Zustand store on frontend with pure event reducers. 12 route modules replacing the monolith, parallelized across 12 agents.
narratives.Constraint: API response shapes must be preserved exactly (same URLs, JSON, status codes). src/lib/* modules stay as-is — only wrapped in Effect services. Effect 4.0.0-beta.43 pinned exactly. Node 22 remains production runtime. No new features — pure architectural migration.
narratives.Risk: Effect 4.x is beta (mitigated by T3Code canary + exact version pin). 185 routes is large scope (mitigated by 12 parallel agents with isolated files). node-pty incompatible with Bun (mitigated by dual-runtime PTY). Frontend regression risk (mitigated by preserved API shapes + Playwright E2E).
narratives.Alternative: Incremental approach (fix polling without framework migration) was rejected — the monolithic Express file and three transport paradigms are the structural root cause. Partial migration (keep Express, add Effect for new routes) was rejected — two frameworks in one server doubles complexity.

items.title: B0: Toolchain Setup — Bun, workspaces, contracts scaffold

narrative.Action: Switch package manager to Bun, create packages/contracts/ workspace package scaffold, configure bunfig.toml, update root package.json with Bun workspaces and Effect version catalog. Verify bun install, bun run build, and bun test all pass with zero regressions.

subItems.title: bun install succeeds and generates bun.lock
bun run build produces working CLI and dashboard
bun test passes all existing tests
packages/contracts/ exists and is resolvable as @panopticon/contracts

items.title: B1: Contracts Package — event schemas, RPC definitions, shared types

narrative.Action: Create packages/contracts/src/ with events.ts (25 domain event Schema definitions), rpc.ts (RPC method + group definitions for streaming, unary, and command methods), types.ts (Issue, Agent, Specialist, Workspace, Cost schemas), and index.ts re-exports. Follow T3Code packages/contracts/src/rpc.ts patterns.

subItems.title: bun run --filter @panopticon/contracts typecheck passes
Event schemas cover all 13 current socket.io events mapped to ~25 domain events
RPC group includes all 9 methods from PRD spec
Server and frontend can both import from @panopticon/contracts

items.title: B2: Event Store — SQLite-backed append-only store with PubSub

narrative.Action: Create src/dashboard/server/event-store.ts with SQLite-backed event persistence (events table in existing panopticon.db), in-memory PubSub for live streaming, monotonic sequence counter, dual-runtime SQLite (Bun native / better-sqlite3), 7-day retention with startup compaction, and schema migrations.

subItems.title: Events persist across server restarts
readFrom(N) returns only events with sequence > N
liveStream delivers events in real-time via PubSub
Sequence numbers are gap-free and monotonic
Works on both Bun and Node runtimes
Unit tests for append, read, stream, restart recovery

items.title: B3: ServerConfig Service — Effect service wrapping env vars and config

narrative.Action: Create src/dashboard/server/config.ts wrapping env vars (~/.panopticon.env), projects.yaml, and CLI flags as an Effect service. Replace inline env loading from current index.ts.

subItems.title: All env vars currently used by index.ts accessible via yield* ServerConfig
Missing required vars produce typed errors, not runtime crashes

items.title: B4: Frontend Transport + Zustand Store + Recovery Coordinator

narrative.Action: Create frontend transport layer (WsTransport with auto-reconnect, RpcClient), Zustand DashboardState store with pure event reducers, selectors, recovery coordinator for sequence gaps, and EventRouter root subscriber component. Follow T3Code apps/web/src/wsTransport.ts, store.ts, orchestrationRecovery.ts patterns.

subItems.title: WsTransport connects to /ws/rpc and auto-reconnects with exponential backoff
Store receives snapshot on connect, applies events incrementally
Recovery coordinator detects sequence gaps and triggers replay
Event coalescing batches rapid events via queueMicrotask
Selectors return correct filtered views
Unit tests for every event reducer and selector

items.title: B5: Server Skeleton + RPC + Shared Services

narrative.Action: Create Effect.js server entry (main.ts, server.ts with dual-runtime HTTP), WebSocket RPC handlers (ws-rpc.ts with subscribeDomainEvents, getSnapshot, replayEvents), static file serving, health route, CORS/JSON middleware, and all shared Effect service wrappers (AgentManager, WorkspaceManager, SpecialistService, CostService, DockerStatsService). Follow T3Code apps/server/src/server.ts and ws.ts patterns.

subItems.title: bun run src/dashboard/server/main.ts starts and listens on port 3011
node dist/server/index.mjs also starts (dual-runtime)
curl http://localhost:3011/api/health returns { status: ok }
Frontend static files served at /
WebSocket connects at /ws/rpc and subscribeDomainEvents streams events
CORS headers present on API responses
All service wrappers compile and export valid Effect services

items.title: B6: Route Module — issues.ts (17 routes)

narrative.Action: Create src/dashboard/server/routes/issues.ts converting all 17 /api/issues routes from Express to Effect HttpRouter.add(). Wrap existing lib calls in Effect.tryPromise(), replace socketIo.emit with eventStore.append(), export issuesRoutes Layer.

subItems.title: All 17 /api/issues routes respond with same shapes as Express version
Socket.io emits replaced with eventStore.append() per mapping table
No execSync in any handler

items.title: B7: Route Module — agents.ts (20 routes)

narrative.Action: Create src/dashboard/server/routes/agents.ts converting all 20 /api/agents routes. Includes start/stop/deep-wipe/messaging/output/health endpoints. Wrap lib/agents.ts calls in Effect, emit agent lifecycle events.

subItems.title: All 20 /api/agents routes respond with same shapes as Express version
Agent lifecycle events emitted to event store
No execSync in any handler

items.title: B8: Route Module — workspaces.ts (19 routes)

narrative.Action: Create src/dashboard/server/routes/workspaces.ts converting all 19 /api/workspaces routes. Includes workspace creation, containerization, detail fetching. Emit workspace lifecycle events.

subItems.title: All 19 /api/workspaces routes respond with same shapes as Express version
Workspace lifecycle events emitted to event store

items.title: B9: Route Module — specialists.ts (33 routes)

narrative.Action: Create src/dashboard/server/routes/specialists.ts converting all 33 /api/specialists routes. Largest route module — covers specialist lifecycle, handoffs, pipeline status, review/test/merge flow. Critical idempotency guards (PAN-328) must be preserved.

subItems.title: All 33 /api/specialists routes respond with same shapes as Express version
postMergeLifecycle idempotency guards preserved (PAN-328)
Pipeline and specialist events emitted to event store

items.title: B10: Route Module — costs.ts (11 routes)

narrative.Action: Create src/dashboard/server/routes/costs.ts converting all 11 /api/costs routes. Includes cost streaming, reconciliation, WAL sync, trends.

subItems.title: All 11 /api/costs routes respond with same shapes as Express version
Cost events emitted to event store

items.title: B11: Route Module — cloister.ts (9 routes)

narrative.Action: Create src/dashboard/server/routes/cloister.ts converting all 9 /api/cloister routes. Includes start/stop/config/status for the Cloister service.

subItems.title: All 9 /api/cloister routes respond with same shapes as Express version

items.title: B12: Route Module — resources.ts (8 routes)

narrative.Action: Create src/dashboard/server/routes/resources.ts converting all 8 /api/resources routes. Docker container/volume/network management.

subItems.title: All 8 /api/resources routes respond with same shapes as Express version

items.title: B13: Route Module — mission-control.ts (7 routes)

narrative.Action: Create src/dashboard/server/routes/mission-control.ts converting all 7 /api/mission-control routes. Planning and activity tracking.

subItems.title: All 7 /api/mission-control routes respond with same shapes as Express version

items.title: B14: Route Module — remote.ts (9 routes)

narrative.Action: Create src/dashboard/server/routes/remote.ts converting all 9 /api/remote routes. Remote workspace management via Fly.io SSH.

subItems.title: All 9 /api/remote routes respond with same shapes as Express version

items.title: B15: Route Module — settings.ts (6 routes)

narrative.Action: Create src/dashboard/server/routes/settings.ts converting all 6 /api/settings routes. Configuration, model availability, API key validation.

subItems.title: All 6 /api/settings routes respond with same shapes as Express version

items.title: B16: Route Module — metrics.ts + convoys.ts (11 routes)

narrative.Action: Create src/dashboard/server/routes/metrics.ts and routes/convoys.ts converting all 11 /api/metrics and /api/convoys routes. Runtime comparisons, task analytics, convoy orchestration.

subItems.title: All 11 /api/metrics and /api/convoys routes respond with same shapes as Express version

items.title: B17: Route Module — misc.ts (35 routes)

narrative.Action: Create src/dashboard/server/routes/misc.ts converting all 35 remaining routes: activity, confirmations, tracker-status, handoffs, shadow, planning, deacon, skills, version, godview, rally, project-mappings, services, registered-projects, cache-status.

subItems.title: All 35 misc routes respond with same shapes as Express version
Planning and pipeline events emitted to event store where applicable

items.title: B18: Integration — wire routes, build, full test suite

narrative.Action: Wire all 12+ route layers into server.ts makeRoutesLayer. Create background fiber layers (IssuePoller, Deacon, DockerStats, Cloister). Update build config for tsdown entry point. Run full test suite — all 223 tests must pass. Smoke test all 185 routes.

subItems.title: bun run build succeeds
All existing tests pass (223/223)
Server starts and all 185 routes respond correctly
WebSocket RPC streams events to connected clients
Background processes (issue polling, deacon) run as Effect fibers

items.title: B19: Frontend Component Migration — React Query → Zustand store

narrative.Action: Migrate App.tsx, KanbanBoard, InspectorPanel, SearchModal, AgentList, CloisterStatusBar, MetricsSummaryRow from React Query polling to Zustand store selectors. Delete useSocketIssues.ts, IssueDetailPanel.tsx (dead code), WorkspacePanel.tsx (dead code).

subItems.title: KanbanBoard renders from store selectors, zero /api/issues HTTP polling
Detail panel opens in <1 second (Playwright)
HTTP requests from kanban board: <5/minute
All frontend tests pass

items.title: B20: Terminal Streaming RPC — dual-runtime PTY

narrative.Action: Create terminal-service.ts with dual-runtime PTY (Bun.spawn on Linux, node-pty on Node). Add subscribeTerminal and subscribeAgentOutput RPCs to ws-rpc.ts. Migrate XTerminal.tsx from raw WebSocket to rpcClient.subscribeTerminal(), TerminalPanel.tsx from HTTP polling to rpcClient.subscribeAgentOutput(). Preserve deferred-spawn (PAN-417), stale-data suppression, remote terminal (Fly.io) support.

subItems.title: Interactive terminal (XTerminal) works via RPC stream — input, resize, deferred spawn
Passive log viewer (TerminalPanel) works via RPC stream — no HTTP polling
Works on both Bun (dev) and Node (production) runtimes
Remote terminal (Fly.io) works via same stream interface
Multiple terminals open simultaneously on one WebSocket
PTY cleanup on disconnect, deferred spawn + stale data suppression preserved

items.title: B21: Cleanup + Playwright Verification + Version Bump

narrative.Action: Delete src/dashboard/server/index.ts (15,793 lines), package-lock.json. Remove express, cors, socket.io, ws, socket.io-client from dependencies. Update dist path references in CLI, build configs, dev scripts. Update CLAUDE.md and docs. Version bump to 0.6.0. Run full Playwright E2E verification suite.

subItems.title: src/dashboard/server/index.ts deleted (15,793 lines removed)
express, cors, socket.io, ws removed from dependencies
Dashboard loads in <3 seconds (Playwright)
Click kanban card → detail panel in <1 second (Playwright)
Terminal tab shows live output (Playwright)
HTTP requests/minute from idle board: <5
WebSocket connections: exactly 1
Version bumped to 0.6.0
